MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-01-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/fee waived. Proceedings reported by: Deborah Neville. (212)

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-22-2005 Off Calendar

For Order Compelling Responses To Interrogatories
Off Calendar Oct-31-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories is GRANTED. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection within 15 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $411.30 are to be paid within 15 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Off Calendar Jun-30-2005 Set For Trial On Jan-03-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-15-05 At 08:30 A.M. In Dept 622
